statement.en: Constructing law and economics : legal thought, social struggle, and the reproduction of American capitalism, 1945-1980
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom cannot be evaluated because the substantive content is unavailable (embargoed thesis with abstract withheld). Classification is impossible without access to the actual claims, arguments, and evidence presented.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 法と資本の葛藤が、体制の再生産を駆動する不可思議な比例。
